use_when: Scanner primary layer detects immediate safety/medical risk language or the user says they may not stay safe.
priority_order: Use grounding only while connecting to help
us_options: Call or text 988 for the Suicide & Crisis Lifeline.
Call 911 for immediate danger, medical emergency, or danger to others.
Go to the nearest emergency department if safe transportation is available.
bot_behavior: Do not continue ordinary coaching while critical safety language is active.
Ask only essential safety questions if needed.
Encourage removing means and not being alone when possible.
